tasks.title: App Marketing OS: execute Opus strategy reset - measurement, Action Arena gate, Glow SEO bet
tasks.description:
First action: Open `memory/app-marketing/opus-strategy-reset-2026-06-18.md`, then update the weekly scoreboard with Action Arena gate status, Glow crawler/indexing state, Nash cap status, and Vista hold status.

Why it matters: The app portfolio was drifting into all-app work. The reset keeps consulting first, closes the Action Arena gate, makes Glow the only ongoing app bet, caps Nash, and parks Vista.

Done looks like: One Friday-ready scoreboard section exists with push/cap/pause/gate decisions and the active Mission Control app-marketing layer matches the reset.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/opus-strategy-reset-2026-06-18.md
- memory/app-marketing/weekly-scoreboard.md
- memory/app-marketing/app-registry.md

Guardrail: No new app features, no external posting automation, no daily Nash cadence, no Vista/ReelFarm scaling, no paid creators except the gated Action Arena kickoff test.
tasks.reason: The app portfolio was drifting into all-app work. The reset keeps consulting first, closes the Action Arena gate, makes Glow the only ongoing app bet, caps Nash, and parks Vista.

tasks.title: Action Arena: clear Apple Developer org transfer, then EAS/App Store readiness
tasks.description:
First action: Open `memory/app-marketing/action-arena-submission-gate-2026-06-18.md`, track the Apple Developer Organization transfer under the LLC, then after it clears confirm EAS project secrets and App Store Connect/TestFlight status from `/Users/jtsomwaru/projects/action-arena`.

Why it matters: Action Arena is the only timed gate. Source is now found, and JT is moving the Apple Developer membership from individual to organization because in-app purchases blocked individual submission; that Apple-side blocker must clear before commissioner outreach or creator tests can convert.

Done looks like: Apple Developer organization status is recorded, EAS secrets/status are confirmed after the transfer clears, the latest TestFlight/App Store Connect state is recorded, one next submission/build action exists, and optional UGC remains locked until app live + attribution ready.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/opus-strategy-reset-2026-06-18.md
- memory/app-marketing/action-arena-submission-gate-2026-06-18.md
- memory/app-marketing/action-arena-launch-checklist-2026-05-26.md

Guardrail: Do not run broad dependency upgrades inside this gate. Keep no-real-money positioning. Do not brief/pay creators before app-live + attribution gates.
tasks.reason: Action Arena is the only timed gate. Source is now found, and JT is moving the Apple Developer membership from individual to organization because in-app purchases blocked individual submission; that Apple-side blocker must clear before commissioner outreach or creator tests can convert.

tasks.title: Glow Index: register GA4 source_tag and run 72h/7d SEO checks
tasks.description:
First action: Register event parameter `source_tag` as an event-scoped custom dimension in GA4 property `537965547`, then re-run Data API checks for `customEvent:source_tag`, `/rankings` page paths, `view_product`, and Search Console page/query rows.

Why it matters: The first SEO/GEO batch is live and baseline is written, but GA4 rejects `customEvent:source_tag` as an invalid dimension. Without this setup, the site can collect page/event data but cannot segment the SEO/GEO source tags.

Done looks like: `memory/app-marketing/glow-post-deploy-measurement-2026-06-18.md` or a follow-up dated note records source-tag dimension queryability, 72h check, 7d check, GSC rows, GA4 page/event counts, and the next-deploy yes/no recommendation.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/glow-post-deploy-measurement-2026-06-18.md
- memory/app-marketing/glow-first-five-money-pages-2026-06-18.md
- memory/app-marketing/measurement-spine.md

Guardrail: No new Replit rebuild, no new category/methodology page, no medical/treatment claims, no fake testimonials, and no before/after claims until measurement says the next page is worth the deploy cost.
tasks.reason: The first SEO/GEO batch is live and baseline is written, but GA4 rejects `customEvent:source_tag` as an invalid dimension. Without this setup, the site can collect page/event data but cannot segment the SEO/GEO source tags.

tasks.title: Glow Index: choose first five money pages after crawler gate
tasks.description:
First action: After crawler access is clean, choose the first five pages by intent, affiliate fit, available product data, and claim safety; save the page queue with target query, direct-answer block, schema, and measurement tag.

Why it matters: Glow's upside is asynchronous SEO/GEO. The page queue must be chosen by winnability and monetization, not generic volume.

Done looks like: `memory/app-marketing/glow-first-five-money-pages-2026-06-18.md` exists with five pages, source tags, build order, claim guardrails, and indexing checks.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/glow-seo-first-page-plan-2026-06-01.md
- memory/app-marketing/glow-10-verdict-pages-status-2026-05-19.md
- memory/app-marketing/measurement-spine.md

Guardrail: No medical/treatment claims; no fake before/after or testimonials; no dupe pages without structured similarity criteria.
tasks.reason: Glow's upside is asynchronous SEO/GEO. The page queue must be chosen by winnability and monetization, not generic volume.

tasks.title: Nash Satoshi: enforce weekly receipt cap and kill daily generic cadence
tasks.description:
First action: Update Nash app-marketing routines so only one weekly human-reviewed ranking-delta/model-disagreement receipt is eligible, measured by methodology-page clicks and waitlist signups.

Why it matters: Nash has a real methodology wedge but is the highest distraction/compliance-risk app. Impressions without clicks are fake momentum.

Done looks like: Weekly review records either one approved receipt with source tag and click/signup metrics, or `NO_NASH_RECEIPT_THIS_WEEK` because no strong delta/disagreement exists.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/app-registry.md
- memory/app-marketing/measurement-spine.md

Guardrail: No financial advice, no price predictions, no performance claims, no automated posting.
tasks.reason: Nash has a real methodology wedge but is the highest distraction/compliance-risk app. Impressions without clicks are fake momentum.

tasks.title: Vista: keep paused and archive immediate-growth tasks unless un-pause trigger fires
tasks.description:
First action: Review active Vista App Marketing tasks and archive/demote anything that implies immediate share-card builds, directory pushes, or ReelFarm scaling.

Why it matters: Vista is the clearest overbuilding trap. It can be monitored, but it should not consume current app-marketing execution time.

Done looks like: The active board has no high-priority Vista execution tasks except passive measurement or an explicit un-pause trigger note.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/app-registry.md
- memory/app-marketing/opus-strategy-reset-2026-06-18.md

Guardrail: Un-pause only on proven share-to-install loop or consulting cash at $10K/month.
tasks.reason: Vista is the clearest overbuilding trap. It can be monitored, but it should not consume current app-marketing execution time.
